case_title: FEST, DONALD vs. GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEST, DONALD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND QUESTIONNAIRE SERVED BY PLTF HIMSELF FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEST, DONALD SERVED MAY-14-1993, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMBEAU, CHARLES

DEPT. 3, JUDGE J.ORR, CSR S.NAYLOR, CLERK, E.MONTI PLTF APPEARING IN PRO PER. DEFENSE COUNSEL, RICHARD BREITWIESER APPEARING FOR DEFT. 10:00 AM. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. NO OPENING STATEMENT BY EITHER PARTY. DONALD FEST, SWORN & PROVIDES TESTIMONY TO THE COURT. COURT VERIFIES THAT THE PLTF DID NOT PROVIDE RE- QUESTED DOCUMENTS TO DEFENSE COUNSEL IN A TIMELY MANNER UNDER CCP 986, 987. PLTF EXH. #1 - FIDELITY IMPROVEMENT CORP CONTRACTOR & WARRANTY DOCUMENT IS MARKED & ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. THE COURT STATES THAT NO ADEQUATE EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED BY THE PLTF. THE PLTF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED ANY NEGLIGENCE TO THE COURT. THE COURT RULES FOR THE DEFT. EXHIBITS RETAINED.
